meta.scenario_description: A standoff jammer covers a mixed package: missile and fighter attack, fighter feint, UAV strike, reconnaissance, and low-altitude helicopter infiltration.

enemies.label: T1
enemies.name: T1(B-52H standoff electronic suppression platform)
enemies.decision_reason: The bomber-sized platform provides electronic cover for the attack package rather than rushing the formation.
enemies.core_features: standoff electronic suppression, high altitude, outside direct attack lane

enemies.label: T2
enemies.name: T2(F-16C feint fighter)
enemies.decision_reason: The behavior resembles attack at first, but the later turn-away suggests deception rather than immediate strike.
enemies.core_features: high-speed approach followed by separation

enemies.label: T3
enemies.name: T3(AGM-86B-like shortcut missile)
enemies.decision_reason: The predicted flight path crosses the formation envelope, so interception and local evasion should be triggered.
enemies.core_features: attack course, very small shortcut, medium range

enemies.label: T4
enemies.name: T4(F-22 high-speed attack fighter)
enemies.decision_reason: A high-speed fighter with strong jamming can launch weapons while compressing the decision window.
enemies.core_features: high speed, strong interference, oblique attack

enemies.label: T5
enemies.name: T5(MQ-9 medium-range attack UAV)
enemies.decision_reason: The UAV has clear attack geometry but leaves a wider response window than missiles or fighters.
enemies.core_features: medium range, medium speed, visible integrated UAV strike

enemies.label: T6
enemies.name: T6(border reconnaissance aircraft)
enemies.decision_reason: The target stays outside the main engagement zone and should be monitored rather than attacked.
enemies.core_features: border patrol and distant observation

enemies.label: T7
enemies.name: T7(AH-64A low-altitude masked attacker)
enemies.decision_reason: The helicopter is not fast, but its low-altitude approach supports a local attack decision.
enemies.core_features: low altitude, terrain masking
